item.text: I confirmed the local API endpoint is currently unreachable on `:8000` and captured a listener process with `lsof`. Next I’m extracting exact goal lines from docs so the plan cites file:line evidence directly.

item.aggregated_output:
1	# Coherence Network — Plan
     2	
     3	## Objective
     4	
     5	Deliver a reliable, continuously improving OSS intelligence platform by prioritizing:
     6	
     7	1. graph/API correctness,
     8	2. spec coverage,
     9	3. pipeline throughput and recovery,
    10	4. operational clarity for maintainers.
    11	
    12	## In-Scope Work
    13	
    14	### Product Delivery
    15	- Project indexing and graph expansion
    16	- Search and project/coherence endpoints
    17	- Import stack analysis workflows
    18	- Web/API integration for current shipped capabilities
    19	- Public deployment maintenance (Railway API + Railway web)
    20	
    21	### Pipeline Delivery
    22	- Automated task routing and execution
    23	- Monitoring and attention heuristics
    24	- Retry/heal workflows
    25	- Status reporting and runbook quality
    26	
    27	### Quality Guardrails
    28	- Spec-first implementation
    29	- Test-first behavior
    30	- CI health and deterministic checks
    31	- Minimal, scoped diffs
    32	
    33	## Current Milestone Track
    34	
    35	- **Milestone A: Core Stability**
    36	  - keep API + indexers stable
    37	  - maintain production deployment health (Railway (API + web))
    38	  - reduce repeated pipeline failures
    39	  - keep status and coverage docs accurate
    40	
    41	- **Milestone B: Execution Efficiency**
    42	  - improve success rate and cycle time
    43	  - improve monitor signal quality
    44	  - reduce manual intervention per overnight run
    45	
    46	- **Milestone C: Data/Intelligence Depth**
    47	  - extend graph data quality
    48	  - improve coherence signal quality
    49	  - tighten test/spec mapping for new capabilities
    50	
    51	## Prioritization Rules
    52	
    53	When tradeoffs appear, prioritize in this order:
    54	
    55	1. correctness and testability,
    56	2. pipeline reliability,
    57	3. observability and maintainability,
    58	4. new feature breadth.
    59	
    60	## Operating Principles
    61	
    62	- Keep changes small and verifiable.
    63	- Prefer explicit specs over implied behavior.
    64	- Do not modify tests to force pass conditions.
    65	- Keep documentation aligned with shipped behavior.
    66	
    67	## Primary References
    68	
    69	- [STATUS](STATUS.md)
    70	- [EXECUTION-PLAN](EXECUTION-PLAN.md)
    71	- [SPEC-COVERAGE](SPEC-COVERAGE.md)
    72	- [SPEC-TRACKING](SPEC-TRACKING.md)

88	| `low_success_rate` | medium | 7d success rate < 80% (10+ tasks) |
    89	| `runner_pm_not_seen` | high | PROCESSES: agent_runner not seen, PM not seen — pipeline processes down |
    90	| `github_actions_high_failure_rate` | medium/high | GitHub Actions completed-run failure rate above threshold (CI minutes/time waste) |
    91	| `output_empty` | high | Completed task has 0 chars output (capture failure or silent crash) |
    92	| `orphan_running` | medium | Single running task > 2h |
    93	| `needs_decision` | medium | PM blocked on human decision |
    94	| `api_unreachable` | high | pipeline-status request fails |
    95	| `metrics_unavailable` | low | GET /api/agent/metrics returns 404 |
    96	| `phase_6_7_not_worked` | medium | Backlog (006) has not reached Phase 6 — Phase 6/7 product-critical items not being worked; verify backlog maps to PLAN phases |
    97	| `public_deploy_contract_blocked` | high | Public deployment contract blocked longer than threshold; stop rollout and escalate |
    98	| `architecture_maintainability_drift` | high/medium | Maintainability audit reports blocking drift or baseline regression (architecture complexity/layer health) |
    99	| `runtime_placeholder_debt` | high | Runtime mock/fake/stub placeholder findings increased beyond baseline |
   100	
   101	**Backlog alignment (spec 007):** GET /api/agent/effectiveness returns `plan_progress.backlog_alignment` with `phase_6_7_status` and `phase_6_7_not_worked`. The monitor flags when Phase 6/7 items are not being worked so progress toward PLAN.md goals is visible.
   102	
   103	## Fallback Recovery (PIPELINE_AUTO_RECOVER=1)
   104	
   105	| Issue | Fallback Action |
   106	|-------|-----------------|
   107	| `stale_version` | Write restart_requested.json → watchdog restarts pipeline |
   108	| `runner_pm_not_seen` | Write restart_requested.json → watchdog restarts pipeline |
   109	| `orphan_running` | PATCH task to failed (unblock pipeline) |
   110	| `github_actions_high_failure_rate` | Create heal task to triage failing workflows and reduce repeat CI waste |
   111	| `no_task_running` | Create heal task (when auto-fix also enabled) |
   112	| `repeated_failures` | Create heal task (when auto-fix also enabled) |
   113	| `architecture_maintainability_drift` | Create high-ROI heal task (when auto-fix also enabled) |
   114	| `runtime_placeholder_debt` | Create placeholder cleanup heal task (when auto-fix also enabled) |
   115	
   116	Suggested SLA knobs for deployment resilience (non-blocking by default):
   117	- `PUBLIC_DEPLOY_VERIFICATION_MAX_ATTEMPTS` (default `8`)
   118	- `PUBLIC_DEPLOY_VERIFICATION_RETRY_SECONDS` (default `60`)
   119	- `PUBLIC_DEPLOY_CONTRACT_BLOCK_THRESHOLD_SECONDS` (default `600`)
   120	
   121	## How to React (Agent)
   122	
   123	1. **Periodically** (e.g. at session start): `GET /api/agent/monitor-issues`.
   124	2. **If `issues` non-empty**: For each issue, follow `suggested_action`:
   125	   - `no_task_running`: Full debug guide in suggested_action. Heal task may already exist (auto-fix). Restart pipeline to continue.
   126	   - `needs_decision`: Use `/reply` or PATCH task with decision.
   127	   - `orphan_running`: PATCH task to failed, or restart pipeline.
   128	   - `api_unreachable`: Restart API; check AGENT_API_BASE.
   129	   - `low_success_rate`: Review metrics; consider prompt/model A/B test.
   130	3. **After action**: Re-check monitor-issues; if still present, escalate or refine approach.
   131	
   132	## How to Improve
   133	
   134	- **Thresholds**: Edit `monitor_pipeline.py` (`STUCK_THRESHOLD_SEC`, `ORPHAN_RUNNING_SEC`, `LOW_SUCCESS_RATE`).
   135	- **New rules**: Add detection blocks in `_run_check` and `_add_issue`.
   136	- **Auto-fix**: Extend auto-fix for `needs_decision` (e.g. create review task) or `low_success_rate` (e.g. log to file for analysis).
   137	- **Measure effectiveness**: Use `GET /api/agent/effectiveness` to track throughput, issue resolution, and goal proximity. Improve pipeline and agents based on metrics.
   138	
   139	## Run Manually
   140

20	
    21	## Hierarchical Status Report (Machine + Human Readable)
    22	
    23	The monitor writes a hierarchical status report each check:
    24	
    25	- **`api/logs/pipeline_status_report.json`** — Machine parseable. Structure:
    26	  - `layer_0_goal` — Throughput, success rate, goal proximity
    27	  - `layer_1_orchestration` — PM, runner, monitor
    28	  - `layer_2_execution` — API, metrics
    29	  - `layer_3_attention` — Issues, resolved_since_last
    30	  - `overall.going_well` — Explicit list of what is OK
    31	  - `overall.needs_attention` — Explicit list of what needs action
    32	
    33	- **`api/logs/pipeline_status_report.txt`** — Human readable, same hierarchy.
    34	
    35	- **`api/logs/monitor.log`** — Each check logs `STATUS OK|ATTENTION` with layer summary; `GOING_WELL` and `NEEDS_ATTENTION` lists for quick scan.
    36	
    37	**API:** `GET /api/agent/status-report` returns the JSON report.
    38	
    39	## Issue Prioritization & Resolution Tracking
    40	
    41	- **Priority**: Each issue has `priority` (1=high, 2=medium, 3=low). Issues are sorted by priority for addressing order.
    42	- **Resolution tracking**: When a condition clears (e.g. metrics_unavailable after API restart), the monitor records it in `api/logs/monitor_resolutions.jsonl`.
    43	- **Effectiveness measurement**: `GET /api/agent/effectiveness` returns throughput, success rate, issues open/resolved, progress by phase, and goal proximity (0–1).
    44	
    45	## How to Check (API)
    46	
    47	```bash
    48	# Current monitor issues (empty when healthy; sorted by priority)
    49	curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/agent/monitor-issues | python3 -m json.tool
    50	
    51	# Pipeline effectiveness (throughput, issues, goal proximity)
    52	curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/agent/effectiveness | python3 -m json.tool
    53	
    54	# Or read file directly
    55	cat api/logs/monitor_issues.json
    56	```
    57	
    58	Pipeline status now includes `running_by_phase`: counts of running+pending per task_type (spec, impl, test, review) for parallel visibility.
    59	
    60	Response shape:
    61	
    62	```json
    63	{
    64	  "issues": [
    65	    {
    66	      "id": "abc12345",
    67	      "condition": "repeated_failures",
    68	      "severity": "high",
    69	      "message": "3+ consecutive failed tasks (same phase)",
    70	      "suggested_action": "Review task logs; consider heal task or model/prompt change",

item.text:
PLAN
1. Goal alignment anchors:
- `pipeline throughput and recovery` ([/Users/ursmuff/.codex/worktrees/4577/Coherence-Network/docs/PLAN.md#L9](/Users/ursmuff/.codex/worktrees/4577/Coherence-Network/docs/PLAN.md#L9))
- `improve success rate and cycle time` ([/Users/ursmuff/.codex/worktrees/4577/Coherence-Network/docs/PLAN.md#L42](/Users/ursmuff/.codex/worktrees/4577/Coherence-Network/docs/PLAN.md#L42))
- Effectiveness must track `success rate` + `goal proximity` ([/Users/ursmuff/.codex/worktrees/4577/Coherence-Network/docs/PIPELINE-MONITORING-AUTOMATED.md#L26](/Users/ursmuff/.codex/worktrees/4577/Coherence-Network/docs/PIPELINE-MONITORING-AUTOMATED.md#L26), [/Users/ursmuff/.codex/worktrees/4577/Coherence-Network/docs/PIPELINE-MONITORING-AUTOMATED.md#L43](/Users/ursmuff/.codex/worktrees/4577/Coherence-Network/docs/PIPELINE-MONITORING-AUTOMATED.md#L43)).
2. Required proof checks:
- `make start-gate`
- `curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/agent/effectiveness | python3 -m json.tool` and record `success_rate`, `goal_proximity`.
3. Guardrail for blocked local API:
- Capture exact uvicorn stderr: `cd api && uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000`
- Check port/process conflict: `lsof -i :8000`
- Apply fix, then retry curl effectiveness until both metrics are captured.

PATCH
No file changes.

RUN
1. `make start-gate` -> failed: `gh auth status` invalid token for `github.com` (`make: *** [start-gate] Error 1`).
2. `curl -sS http://localhost:8000/api/agent/effectiveness` -> failed: `curl: (7) Couldn't connect to server`.
3. `lsof -i :8000` -> found listener: `Python ... TCP localhost:irdmi (LISTEN)`.
4. `cd api && uvicorn ... --port 8000` -> stderr captured: `error while attempting to bind ... operation not permitted`.
